items.title: US designates Iran as ‘state sponsor of wrongful detention’
items.dek: Sorry but considering the huge amount of wrongful detentions going around with ICE this sounded oniony to me. submitted by /u/Stranger1982 [link] [comments]

items.title: Flight logs and hot tub photo among key moments from Bill Clinton's deposition
items.dek: The former US president, who is featured in photographs within the Epstein files, denies having any knowledge of the convicted sex offender's crimes.
items.body: The former US president, who is featured in photographs within the Epstein files, denies having any knowledge of the convicted sex offender's crimes.
